Output:

        metadata["original_filename"] = original_filename
        metadata["named_output_path"] = named_output_path
        task.metadata = metadata

        if named_output_path != output_path:
            normalized_result["original_output_path"] = output_path
            normalized_result["named_output_path"] = named_output_path
            normalized_result["output_path"] = named_output_path
        return normalized_result

    def _attach_video_render_manifest(self, task: UnifiedTask, result: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        normalized_result = dict(result or {})
        artifacts = self._collect_video_artifacts(task=task, result=normalized_result)
        if not artifacts:
            return normalized_result

        render_manifest = self._build_video_render_manifest(
            task=task,
            result=normalized_result,
            artifacts=artifacts,
        )
        normalized_result["artifacts"] = artifacts
        normalized_result["render_manifest"] = render_manifest
        return normalized_result

    def _collect_video_artifacts(self, task: UnifiedTask, result: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        task_dir = Path(self.config.output_dir) / task.task_id
        output_path = str(result.get("output_path") or "").strip()
        named_output_path = str(result.get("named_output_path") or "").strip()
        original_output_path = str(result.get("original_output_path") or "").strip()
        preferred_primary_path = output_path or named_output_path or original_output_path
        primary_resolved = self._safe_resolve_existing_path(preferred_primary_path)

        candidate_files: Dict[str, Path] = {}
        for raw_path in (output_path, named_output_path, original_output_path):
            resolved = self._safe_resolve_existing_path(raw_path)
            if resolved is not None:
                candidate_files[str(resolved)] = resolved

        candidate_dirs: List[Path] = []
        for raw_dir in (
            str(task_dir),
            str(Path(output_path).parent) if output_path else "",
            str(Path(named_output_path).parent) if named_output_path else "",
            str(Path(original_output_path).parent) if original_output_path else "",
        ):
            resolved_dir = self._safe_resolve_existing_dir(raw_dir)
            if resolved_dir is None:
                continue
            if resolved_dir not in candidate_dirs:
                candidate_dirs.append(resolved_dir)

        for base_dir in candidate_dirs:
            try:
                files = sorted(
                    [path for path in base_dir.rglob("*") if path.is_file()],
                    key=lambda item: str(item).lower(),
                )
            except Exception:
                continue
            for path in files:
                if not self._should_expose_video_artifact(path):
                    continue
                resolved = self._safe_resolve_existing_path(str(path))
                if resolved is None:
                    continue
                candidate_files[str(resolved)] = resolved

        artifacts: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
        used_ids: set[str] = set()
        task_dir_resolved = self._safe_resolve_existing_dir(str(task_dir))
        sorted_files = sorted(
            candidate_files.values(),
            key=lambda item: self._video_artifact_sort_key(
                path=item,
                primary_resolved=primary_resolved,
            ),
        )
        single_artifact_roles = {
            "final_video",
            "video_subtitled",
            "video_no_subtitle",
            "coverless_video",
            "subtitle_srt",
            "subtitle_ass",
            "transcript_text",
            "clip_text",
            "forum_post_info",
            "cover_image",
            "cover_manifest",
            "processing_log",
            "pipeline_state",
            "video",
        }
        selected_files: List[Tuple[Path, str, str]] = []
        seen_roles: set[str] = set()
        for path in sorted_files:
            role, kind = self._classify_video_artifact_role(
                path=path,
                primary_resolved=primary_resolved,
            )
            if role in single_artifact_roles and role in seen_roles:
                continue
            seen_roles.add(role)
            selected_files.append((path, role, kind))

        for index, artifact_info in enumerate(selected_files, start=1):
            path, role, kind = artifact_info
            artifact_id = self._build_video_artifact_id(
                role=role,
                index=index,
                used_ids=used_ids,
            )
            relative_path = self._build_artifact_relative_path(path=path, task_dir=task_dir_resolved)
            stat = path.stat()
            artifacts.append(
                {
                    "artifact_id": artifact_id,
                    "kind": kind,
                    "role": role,
                    "filename": path.name,
                    "path": str(path),
                    "relative_path": relative_path,
                    "size_bytes": int(stat.st_size),
                    "is_primary": primary_resolved is not None and path == primary_resolved,
                }
            )
        return artifacts

    def _build_video_render_manifest(
        self,
        task: UnifiedTask,
        result: Dict[str, Any],
        artifacts: List[Dict[str, Any]],
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        primary_artifact_id = ""
        videos: Dict[str, str] = {}
        subtitles: Dict[str, str] = {}
        texts: Dict[str, str] = {}
        context: Dict[str, str] = {}
        logs: Dict[str, str] = {}
        cover: Dict[str, str] = {}
        pipeline_state: Dict[str, Any] = {}

        for artifact in artifacts:
            artifact_id = str(artifact.get("artifact_id") or "").strip()
            role = str(artifact.get("role") or "").strip()
            path_text = str(artifact.get("path") or "").strip()
            if artifact.get("is_primary") and artifact_id:
                primary_artifact_id = artifact_id

            if role == "final_video" and artifact_id:
                videos["primary"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "video_subtitled" and artifact_id and "subtitled" not in videos:
                videos["subtitled"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "video_no_subtitle" and artifact_id:
                videos["no_subtitle"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "coverless_video" and artifact_id:
                videos["coverless"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "video" and artifact_id and "alternate" not in videos:
                videos["alternate"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "subtitle_srt" and artifact_id:
                subtitles["srt"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "subtitle_ass" and artifact_id:
                subtitles["ass"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "transcript_text" and artifact_id:
                subtitles["script"] = artifact_id
                texts["script"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "clip_text" and artifact_id:
                texts["clip_text"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "forum_post_info" and artifact_id:
                context["forum_post_info"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "cover_image" and artifact_id and "image" not in cover:
                cover["image"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "cover_manifest" and artifact_id:
                cover["manifest"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "processing_log" and artifact_id and "processing" not in logs:
                logs["processing"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "pipeline_state" and artifact_id:
                pipeline_state = {
                    "artifact_id": artifact_id,
                    "path": path_text,
                }
                pipeline_state.update(self._read_pipeline_state_summary(path_text))

        manifest: Dict[str, Any] = {
            "task_id": task.task_id,
            "artifact_count": len(artifacts),
            "primary_artifact_id": primary_artifact_id,
            "primary_output_path": str(result.get("output_path") or "").strip(),
            "videos": videos,
            "subtitles": subtitles,
            "cover": cover,
        }
        if texts:
            manifest["texts"] = texts
        if context:
            manifest["context"] = context
        if logs:
            manifest["logs"] = logs
        if pipeline_state:
            manifest["pipeline_state"] = pipeline_state
        return manifest

    def _safe_resolve_existing_path(self, value: str) -> Optional[Path]:
        text = str(value or "").strip()
        if not text:
            return None
        candidate = Path(text)
        if not candidate.exists() or not candidate.is_file():
            return None
        try:
            return candidate.resolve()
        except Exception:
            return candidate

    def _safe_resolve_existing_dir(self, value: str) -> Optional[Path]:
        text = str(value or "").strip()
        if not text:
            return None
        candidate = Path(text)
        if not candidate.exists() or not candidate.is_dir():
            return None
        try:
            return candidate.resolve()
        except Exception:
            return candidate

    def _should_expose_video_artifact(self, path: Path) -> bool:
        suffix = path.suffix.lower()
        name = path.name.lower()
        video_exts = {".mp4", ".mov", ".mkv", ".avi", ".m4v", ".webm"}
        image_exts = {".png", ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".webp"}
        if suffix in video_exts or suffix in image_exts:
            return True
        if name in {"total.srt", "total.ass", "script.txt", "state.json"}:
            return True
        if name in {"clip_text.txt", "forum_post_info.json"}:
            return True
        if suffix == ".json" and "cover_manifest" in name:
            return True
        if suffix == ".log":
            return True
        return False

    def _classify_video_artifact_role(self, path: Path, primary_resolved: Optional[Path]) -> Tuple[str, str]:
        text = path.name.lower()
        suffix = path.suffix.lower()
        if primary_resolved is not None and path == primary_resolved:
            return "final_video", "video"

我顺手核到一处容易低估工作量的地方：虽然方案把“平台无关 API/CLI”放在后面，但仓库里其实已经有 apps/api/main.py 和 scripts/openclaw_task_client.py 这类外部入口雏形，所以更准确的说法不是“从零建立”，而是“抽离 OpenClaw 专属约定并补 schema/version/契约测试”。这会影响排期评估。

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Iterable

from apps.api.openclaw_client import run_openclaw_video_task


def _parse_args(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> argparse.Namespace:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Submit CloneCut video task and fetch OpenClaw-friendly result")
    parser.add_argument("--api-base", default="http://127.0.0.1:18100", help="CloneCut API base URL")
    parser.add_argument("--file", required=True, help="Local video path to upload")
    parser.add_argument("--api-token", default="", help="CloneCut API token, optional")
    parser.add_argument("--api-token-env", default="CLONECUT_API_TOKEN", help="fallback env name for api token")
    parser.add_argument("--task-id", default="", help="optional explicit task id")
    parser.add_argument("--source", default="openclaw_client", help="task source marker")
    parser.add_argument("--stage5-model-name", default="", help="stage5 model name or backend model id")
    parser.add_argument("--clip-text", default="", help="optional explicit clip text override")
    parser.add_argument("--post-url", default="", help="optional forum post url")
    parser.add_argument("--no-wait", action="store_true", help="only submit task without polling result")
    parser.add_argument("--submit-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=30.0, help="submit request timeout")
    parser.add_argument("--wait-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=1800.0, help="poll total timeout")
    parser.add_argument("--poll-interval-seconds", type=float, default=5.0, help="poll interval")
    parser.add_argument("--request-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=15.0, help="single polling request timeout")
    parser.add_argument("--output-json", default="", help="optional path to persist final json result")
    return parser.parse_args(list(argv) if argv is not None else None)


def main(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> int:
    args = _parse_args(argv)
    api_token = str(args.api_token or "").strip() or str(os.getenv(args.api_token_env, "") or "").strip()

    extra_form: dict[str, str] = {}
    if args.clip_text:
        extra_form["clip_text"] = str(args.clip_text)
    if args.post_url:
        extra_form["post_url"] = str(args.post_url)

    payload = run_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base=args.api_base,
        video_path=args.file,
        api_token=api_token,
        task_id=args.task_id,
        source=args.source,
        stage5_model_name=args.stage5_model_name,
        extra_form=extra_form,
        wait=not bool(args.no_wait),
        submit_timeout_seconds=float(args.submit_timeout_seconds),
        wait_timeout_seconds=float(args.wait_timeout_seconds),
        poll_interval_seconds=float(args.poll_interval_seconds),
        request_timeout_seconds=float(args.request_timeout_seconds),
    )
    text = json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    print(text)

    output_json = str(args.output_json or "").strip()
    if output_json:
        output_path = Path(output_json).expanduser()
        output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        output_path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

    def test_internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]

        cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True

我又补出一个比文档更严重的现实风险：tests/unit/test_worker_service.py::test_internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8 现在也会失败，而且不是简单导入失败，而是 worker 走旧 internal pipeline 后拿到 state.json 的 last_completed_step=0，任务 20 秒后还卡在 processing。也就是说，当前“过渡主链”本身并不稳。

    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path:
        state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
        if not state_file.exists():
            raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline state missing: {state_file}")
        try:
            payload = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception as exc:
            raise RuntimeError(f"parse internal pipeline state failed: {state_file}: {exc}") from exc

        last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))
        if last_completed_step < 9:
            raise RuntimeError(
                f"internal pipeline incomplete: last_completed_step={last_completed_step} state_file={state_file}"
            )
        output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
        if output_file:
            candidate = Path(output_file)
            if candidate.exists():
                return candidate

        patterns = [
            f"{source_path.stem}*_智能剪辑带字幕版*.mp4",
            "*_智能剪辑带字幕版*.mp4",
            "*.mp4",
        ]
        for pattern in patterns:
            candidates = [
                p for p in task_dir.rglob(pattern)
                if p.is_file() and "_stages" not in p.parts and "debug" not in p.parts
            ]
            if candidates:
                candidates.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
                return candidates[0]

        raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline produced no video output under: {task_dir}")

    def _run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
        self,
        task: UnifiedTask,
        source: Path,
        task_dir: Path,

    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "internal-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    service.start()
    try:
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(
            {
                "task_type": "video",
                "source_path": str(source),
                "metadata": {"source": "unit"},
            }
        )
        assert ok
        assert not error
        assert task_id

        deadline = time.time() + 20
        final_task = None
        while time.time() < deadline:
            final_task = service.get_task(task_id)
            if final_task and final_task.get("status") == "completed":
                break
            time.sleep(0.1)

        assert isinstance(final_task, dict)
        assert final_task.get("status") == "completed"
        result = final_task.get("result")
        assert isinstance(result, dict)
        assert result.get("engine") == "internal_pipeline"
        executed = result.get("executed_stages") or []
        assert "stage1_transcode" in executed
        assert "stage8_cover" in executed
    finally:
        service.stop()

Output:
        except Exception as exc:
            self._fail_task(task, exc, failed_from=TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING)

    def _run_process_stage(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
        self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.PROCESSING)
        task.stage_checkpoint = "process"
        self._persist_task(task)
        self.logger.info("task processing started: task_id=%s", task.task_id)

        try:
            if task.task_type in {TaskType.TTS, TaskType.VOICE_CLONE}:
                result = self._process_tts_like(task)
            else:
                result = self._process_video_like(task)
            if task.task_type == TaskType.VIDEO:
                result = self._apply_video_output_naming(task, result)
                result = self._attach_video_render_manifest(task, result)

            task.result = result
            task.output_path = result.get("output_path")
            if task.output_path and task.output_path not in task.output_files:
                task.output_files.append(task.output_path)
            task.error_message = None
            self._persist_task(task)

            if task.output_path and Path(task.output_path).exists():
                self._enqueue_task("upload", task)
                return
            self._complete_task(task)
        except Exception as exc:
            self._fail_task(task, exc, failed_from=TaskStatus.PROCESSING)

    def _run_upload_stage(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
        self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.UPLOADING)
        task.stage_checkpoint = "upload"
        self._persist_task(task)
        self.logger.info("task uploading started: task_id=%s", task.task_id)
        started = time.perf_counter()

        try:
            upload_result = self._upload_output(task)
            upload_result["duration_ms"] = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
            result = dict(task.result or {})
            result["upload"] = upload_result
            task.result = result
            task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
            task.metadata["upload_duration_ms"] = upload_result["duration_ms"]
            task.error_message = None
            self._persist_task(task)
            self._complete_task(task)
        except Exception as exc:
            self._fail_task(task, exc, failed_from=TaskStatus.UPLOADING)

    def _dequeue_stage_task(self, stage: str) -> Optional[UnifiedTask]:
        pop_map = {
            "download": self.queue_adapter.pop_download,
            "process": self.queue_adapter.pop_process,
            "upload": self.queue_adapter.pop_upload,
        }
        pop_fn = pop_map.get(stage)
        if pop_fn is None:

from __future__ import annotations

import multiprocessing
import os
from concurrent.futures import ProcessPoolExecutor
from concurrent.futures.process import BrokenProcessPool
from pathlib import Path
from threading import RLock
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


def _reconfigure_stdio_utf8() -> None:
    for stream_name in ("stdout", "stderr"):
        stream = getattr(os.sys, stream_name, None)
        if stream is None:
            continue
        reconfigure = getattr(stream, "reconfigure", None)
        if callable(reconfigure):
            try:
                reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
            except Exception:
                continue


def _apply_env(overrides: Optional[Dict[str, str]]) -> Dict[str, Optional[str]]:
    snapshot: Dict[str, Optional[str]] = {}
    for key, value in (overrides or {}).items():
        snapshot[key] = os.environ.get(key)
        if value:
            os.environ[key] = str(value)
        elif key in os.environ:
            os.environ.pop(key, None)
    return snapshot


def _restore_env(snapshot: Dict[str, Optional[str]]) -> None:
    for key, value in snapshot.items():
        if value is None:
            os.environ.pop(key, None)
        else:
            os.environ[key] = value


def _set_repo_root(repo_root: str) -> str:
    resolved = str(Path(repo_root).resolve())
    if resolved not in os.sys.path:
        os.sys.path.insert(0, resolved)
    os.chdir(resolved)
    return resolved


def _child_initializer(repo_root: str, base_env: Optional[Dict[str, str]]) -> None:
    _reconfigure_stdio_utf8()
    _apply_env(base_env)
    _set_repo_root(repo_root)


def _warmup_job(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    _reconfigure_stdio_utf8()
    _set_repo_root(str(payload["repo_root"]))
    env_snapshot = _apply_env(payload.get("env"))
    try:
        from domain.video.pre.main import pipeline as pipeline_module

        warmed = pipeline_module.warm_pipeline_runtime(output_dir=str(payload["output_dir"]))
        return {"warmed": bool(warmed)}
    finally:
        _restore_env(env_snapshot)


def _execute_pipeline_job(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    _reconfigure_stdio_utf8()
    _set_repo_root(str(payload["repo_root"]))
    env_snapshot = _apply_env(payload.get("env"))
    try:
        from domain.video.pre.main import pipeline as pipeline_module

        success = pipeline_module.run_pipeline_request(
            input_path=str(payload["input_path"]),
            output_dir=str(payload["output_dir"]),
            model=payload.get("model"),
            file_encoding=payload.get("file_encoding"),
            enable_preprocess=bool(payload.get("enable_preprocess", False)),
            disable_preprocess=bool(payload.get("disable_preprocess", False)),
            clip_text=payload.get("clip_text"),
            clip_text_file=payload.get("clip_text_file"),
            forum_post_info_json=payload.get("forum_post_info_json"),
            organize_delete_original=payload.get("organize_delete_original"),
        )
        if not success:
            raise RuntimeError("warm internal pipeline returned False")
        return {"success": True}
    finally:
        _restore_env(env_snapshot)


class InternalPipelineWarmRunner:
    def __init__(
        self,
        *,
        repo_root: str,
        output_dir: str,
        pool_size: int = 1,
        warmup_on_start: bool = True,
        base_env: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
        logger: Any = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.repo_root = str(Path(repo_root).resolve())
        self.output_dir = str(Path(output_dir).resolve())
        self.pool_size = max(1, int(pool_size))
        self.warmup_on_start = bool(warmup_on_start)
        self.base_env = dict(base_env or {})
        self.logger = logger
        self._executor: Optional[ProcessPoolExecutor] = None
        self._lock = RLock()

    def start(self) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            if self._executor is not None:
                return
            context = multiprocessing.get_context("spawn")
            self._executor = ProcessPoolExecutor(
                max_workers=self.pool_size,
                mp_context=context,
                initializer=_child_initializer,
                initargs=(self.repo_root, self.base_env),
            )
            if self.warmup_on_start:
                for _ in range(self.pool_size):
                    self._executor.submit(
                        _warmup_job,
                        {
                            "repo_root": self.repo_root,
                            "output_dir": self.output_dir,
                            "env": {},
                        },
                    )
            if self.logger is not None:
                self.logger.info(
                    "internal warm runner started: pool_size=%s warmup_on_start=%s",
                    self.pool_size,
                    self.warmup_on_start,
                )

    def stop(self) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            executor = self._executor
            self._executor = None
        if executor is not None:
            executor.shutdown(wait=False, cancel_futures=True)
            if self.logger is not None:
                self.logger.info("internal warm runner stopped")

    def execute(self, *, payload: Dict[str, Any], timeout_seconds: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        if self._executor is None:
            self.start()
        executor = self._executor
        if executor is None:
            raise RuntimeError("warm runner executor unavailable")

        try:
            future = executor.submit(_execute_pipeline_job, payload)
            return future.result(timeout=timeout_seconds)
        except BrokenProcessPool as exc:
            self.stop()
            raise RuntimeError(f"warm runner process pool broke: {exc}") from exc

from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
import os


@dataclass
class VideoPipelineConfig:
    output_dir: str = "output"
    stop_on_error: bool = True
    keep_intermediate_files: bool = False

    @classmethod
    def from_env(cls, output_dir: str) -> "VideoPipelineConfig":
        stop_on_error = os.getenv("CLONECUT_PIPELINE_STOP_ON_ERROR", "true").strip().lower() == "true"
        keep_intermediate = (
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_PIPELINE_KEEP_INTERMEDIATE", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
        )
        return cls(
            output_dir=output_dir,
            stop_on_error=stop_on_error,
            keep_intermediate_files=keep_intermediate,
        )


__all__ = ["VideoPipelineConfig"]

4. 再补其他平台 skill / MCP tool

## 8. 方案B的执行顺序

### 阶段1：恢复可导入的内置流水线骨架

目标：让 `domain.video.pipeline` 能导入、测试能收集。

产出：

- `domain/video/stages/` 基础目录
- `StageResult` 与通用工具
- `__init__` 导出函数与模块

### 阶段2：按业务主链迁移 stage 实现

建议顺序：

1. `stage0_clean`
2. `stage1_transcode`
3. `stage2_silence`
4. `stage4_asr`
5. `stage5_ai_text`
6. `stage6_clip`
7. `stage6_5_resub`
8. `stage7_correct`
9. `stage7_subtitle`
10. `stage8_cover`
11. `stage9_organize`
12. `stage3_repair` 作为算法增强后置项补齐，但在骨架阶段必须先提供最小可运行实现

说明：`stage3` 当前并不是 OpenClaw 主链关键路径，优先级低于 2/4/5/6/7/8/9。

### 阶段3：统一资源生命周期与 ready 治理

目标：把重资源预加载、资源所有权、并发锁和 ready 状态做成 worker 内部能力。

实践方式：

- 在 worker 启动时初始化模型与工具实例
- 通过依赖注入或受控 registry 注入到 stage

## Phase 2：迁移主链 stages

### 2.1 基础处理阶段

- [ ] 迁移 `stage0_clean`
- [ ] 迁移 `stage1_transcode`
- [ ] 迁移 `stage2_silence`
- [ ] 迁移 `stage3_repair`

验收：

- [ ] `tests/unit/test_stage2_stage7_stage9.py` 中与 stage2 相关用例通过
- [ ] 产物命名与 manifest 稳定

### 2.2 识别与文本阶段

- [ ] 迁移 `stage4_asr`
- [ ] 迁移 `stage5_ai_text`
- [ ] 接入论坛上下文：`hotwords`、`speaker`
- [ ] 保持 `clip_text`、`script`、manifest 产物稳定
- [ ] 保持 `timeline_fallback`、`strict_rejected`、`rule_based` 等当前测试契约稳定

验收：

- [ ] `tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py -q` 通过
- [ ] `tests/unit/test_video_pipeline.py -q` 中 stage4/stage5 相关用例通过

### 2.3 剪辑与重字幕阶段

- [ ] 迁移 `stage6_clip`
- [ ] 迁移 `stage6_5_resub`
- [ ] 迁移 `stage7_correct`
- [ ] 迁移 `stage7_subtitle`
- [ ] 保持 `copy_fallback`、`strict_rejected`、字幕优先级与字体自适应等当前测试契约稳定

验收：

- [ ] `tests/unit/test_stage6_clip.py -q` 通过
- [ ] `tests/unit/test_stage6_5_resub.py -q` 通过
- [ ] `tests/unit/test_stage7_correct.py -q` 通过

### 2.4 封面与整理阶段

- [ ] 迁移 `stage8_cover`
- [ ] 迁移 `stage9_organize`
- [ ] 接通 `cover_title_up/middle/down` 与中文键名映射
- [ ] 接通 `original_filename` 到最终产物目录命名
- [ ] 保持 stage8 `strict_rejected` 和 overlay manifest 契约稳定

验收：

- [ ] `tests/unit/test_stage2_stage7_stage9.py -q` 中 stage8/stage9 用例通过
- [ ] `tests/unit/test_video_pipeline.py -q` 中封面与整理相关用例通过

## Phase 3：统一 worker 内常驻资源生命周期

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

import pytest

from apps.api.openclaw_client import run_openclaw_video_task, submit_openclaw_video_task, wait_for_openclaw_result


class _FakeResponse:
    def __init__(self, status_code: int, payload):
        self.status_code = status_code
        self._payload = payload
        self.text = str(payload)

    def json(self):
        return self._payload


class _FakeSession:
    def __init__(self, post_responses=None, get_responses=None) -> None:
        self.post_responses = list(post_responses or [])
        self.get_responses = list(get_responses or [])
        self.post_calls = []
        self.get_calls = []

    def post(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.post_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.post_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected post call")
        return self.post_responses.pop(0)

    def get(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.get_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.get_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected get call")
        return self.get_responses.pop(0)


def test_submit_openclaw_video_task_posts_expected_form(tmp_path) -> None:
    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
    video.write_bytes(b"video")
    session = _FakeSession(
        post_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                201,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result_url": "/api/tasks/task-123/openclaw-result",
                },
            )
        ]
    )

    payload = submit_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        video_path=video,
        api_token="token-1",
        stage5_model_name="yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
        extra_form={"metadata": {"source": "test"}},
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("task_id") == "task-123"
    call = session.post_calls[0]
    assert call["url"] == "http://127.0.0.1:18100/api/tasks/upload-video"
    assert call["headers"]["Authorization"] == "Bearer token-1"
    assert call["data"]["stage5_model_name"] == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
    assert call["data"]["metadata"] == '{"source": "test"}'
    uploaded_name, _, uploaded_content_type = call["files"]["file"]
    assert uploaded_name == "sample.mp4"
    assert uploaded_content_type == "video/mp4"


def test_wait_for_openclaw_result_polls_until_completed(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    session = _FakeSession(
        get_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result": {"status": "processing"},
                },
            ),
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result": {"status": "completed", "outputs": {"final_video": {"artifact_id": "final"}}},
                },
            ),
        ]
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.openclaw_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)

    payload = wait_for_openclaw_result(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        task_id="task-123",
        poll_interval_seconds=0.2,
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("openclaw_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"
    assert len(session.get_calls) == 2


def test_run_openclaw_video_task_returns_submit_and_result(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
    video.write_bytes(b"video")
    session = _FakeSession(
        post_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                201,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-789",
                },
            )
        ],
        get_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-789",
                    "openclaw_result": {"status": "completed"},
                },
            )
        ],
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.openclaw_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)

    payload = run_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        video_path=video,
        wait=True,
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("submit", {}).get("task_id") == "task-789"
    assert payload.get("result", {}).get("openclaw_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"


def test_submit_openclaw_video_task_requires_existing_file(tmp_path) -> None:
    missing = Path(tmp_path / "missing.mp4")
    with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):
        submit_openclaw_video_task(
            api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
            video_path=missing,
        )

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import mimetypes
from pathlib import Path
import time
from typing import Any, Mapping

import requests


def _normalize_api_base(api_base: str) -> str:
    text = str(api_base or "").strip().rstrip("/")
    if not text:
        raise ValueError("api_base is required")
    return text


def _resolve_api_url(api_base: str, path: str) -> str:
    base = _normalize_api_base(api_base)
    suffix = str(path or "").strip()
    if not suffix:
        return base
    if not suffix.startswith("/"):
        suffix = "/" + suffix
    return base + suffix


def _build_auth_headers(api_token: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    token = str(api_token or "").strip()
    if not token:
        return {}
    return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}


def _response_json(response: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
    try:
        payload = response.json()
    except Exception as exc:
        status_code = getattr(response, "status_code", "unknown")
        text = str(getattr(response, "text", "") or "").strip()
        raise RuntimeError(f"api returned non-json response: status={status_code} body={text}") from exc
    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
        raise RuntimeError(f"api returned invalid payload type: {type(payload)!r}")
    return payload


def _ensure_success_payload(payload: Mapping[str, Any], response: Any, context: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    body = dict(payload or {})
    if bool(body.get("success")):
        return body
    status_code = getattr(response, "status_code", "unknown")
    error = str(body.get("error") or "").strip() or f"{context} failed"
    raise RuntimeError(f"{context} failed: status={status_code} error={error}")


def _coerce_form_value(value: Any) -> str:
    if isinstance(value, (dict, list)):
        return json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False)
    if value is None:
        return ""
    return str(value)


def submit_openclaw_video_task(
    api_base: str,
    video_path: str | Path,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    task_id: str = "",
    source: str = "openclaw_client",
    stage5_model_name: str = "",
    extra_form: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
    timeout_seconds: float = 30.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    client = session or requests
    file_path = Path(video_path).expanduser()
    if not file_path.exists() or not file_path.is_file():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"video file not found: {file_path}")

    form: dict[str, str] = {"source": source}
    if task_id:
        form["task_id"] = str(task_id).strip()
    if stage5_model_name:
        form["stage5_model_name"] = str(stage5_model_name).strip()
    for key, value in dict(extra_form or {}).items():
        text = _coerce_form_value(value)
        if text:
            form[str(key)] = text

    content_type = mimetypes.guess_type(file_path.name)[0] or "application/octet-stream"
    with file_path.open("rb") as file_handle:
        response = client.post(
            _resolve_api_url(api_base, "/api/tasks/upload-video"),
            data=form,
            files={"file": (file_path.name, file_handle, content_type)},
            headers=_build_auth_headers(api_token),
            timeout=max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds)),
        )
    payload = _response_json(response)
    return _ensure_success_payload(payload, response, context="submit openclaw video task")


def fetch_openclaw_result(
    api_base: str,
    task_id: str,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    client = session or requests
    resolved_task_id = str(task_id or "").strip()
    if not resolved_task_id:
        raise ValueError("task_id is required")

    response = client.get(
        _resolve_api_url(api_base, f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/openclaw-result"),
        headers=_build_auth_headers(api_token),
        timeout=max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds)),
    )
    payload = _response_json(response)
    return _ensure_success_payload(payload, response, context="fetch openclaw result")


def wait_for_openclaw_result(
    api_base: str,
    task_id: str,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    timeout_seconds: float = 1800.0,
    poll_interval_seconds: float = 5.0,
    request_timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    deadline = time.time() + max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds))
    while True:
        payload = fetch_openclaw_result(
            api_base=api_base,
            task_id=task_id,
            api_token=api_token,
            timeout_seconds=request_timeout_seconds,
            session=session,
        )
        result = payload.get("openclaw_result") if isinstance(payload.get("openclaw_result"), dict) else {}
        status = str(result.get("status") or "").strip().lower()
        if status in {"completed", "failed", "cancelled"}:
            return payload
        if time.time() >= deadline:
            raise TimeoutError(f"wait openclaw result timed out: task_id={task_id} status={status or 'unknown'}")
        time.sleep(max(0.2, float(poll_interval_seconds)))


def run_openclaw_video_task(
    api_base: str,
    video_path: str | Path,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    task_id: str = "",
    source: str = "openclaw_client",
    stage5_model_name: str = "",
    extra_form: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
    wait: bool = True,
    submit_timeout_seconds: float = 30.0,
    wait_timeout_seconds: float = 1800.0,
    poll_interval_seconds: float = 5.0,
    request_timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    submitted = submit_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base=api_base,
        video_path=video_path,
        api_token=api_token,
        task_id=task_id,
        source=source,
        stage5_model_name=stage5_model_name,
        extra_form=extra_form,
        timeout_seconds=submit_timeout_seconds,
        session=session,
    )
    output = {"submit": submitted}
    if not wait:
        return output

    resolved_task_id = str(submitted.get("task_id") or "").strip()
    if not resolved_task_id:
        raise RuntimeError("submit response missing task_id")
    output["result"] = wait_for_openclaw_result(
        api_base=api_base,
        task_id=resolved_task_id,
        api_token=api_token,
        timeout_seconds=wait_timeout_seconds,
        poll_interval_seconds=poll_interval_seconds,
        request_timeout_seconds=request_timeout_seconds,
        session=session,
    )
    return output


__all__ = [
    "submit_openclaw_video_task",
    "fetch_openclaw_result",
    "wait_for_openclaw_result",
    "run_openclaw_video_task",
]

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: ## 7. 方案B的核心改造点 ### 6.1 重建 `domain/video/stages/` 这是第一阻塞项，也是方案B起点。 必须补齐至少以下文件： - `domain/video/stages/__init__.py` - `domain/video/st...

## 7. 方案B的核心改造点

### 6.1 重建 `domain/video/stages/`

这是第一阻塞项，也是方案B起点。

必须补齐至少以下文件：

- `domain/video/stages/__init__.py`
- `domain/video/stages/base.py`
- `domain/video/stages/utils.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage0_clean.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage1_transcode.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage2_silence.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage3_repair.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage4_asr.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage5_ai_text.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage6_clip.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage6_5_resub.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage7_correct.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage7_subtitle.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage8_cover.py`
- `domain/video/stages/stage9_organize.py`

### 6.2 将旧 `pre/stage/*` 逻辑迁移为新 stage 实现

迁移不是简单复制，而是做三件事：

1. 去除交互式输入
2. 去除脚本式全局副作用
3. 收敛为可测试、可编排、可观测的单阶段函数

### 6.3 让 `VideoPipeline` 真正可运行

需要让 `domain/video/pipeline.py` 成为稳定编排器，具备：

- 顺序执行
- 阶段上下文透传
- performance tracker 与 resource monitor 挂接
- stage 失败时的可诊断信息
- artifacts / manifest 汇总
- 对当前测试已锁定的 `method` / `engine` / `fallback_used` / `strict_rejected` 等字段保持契约清晰

### 6.4 让 worker 切到内置 pipeline

最终目标是：

- 通用视频任务主路径不再调用 `domain/video/pre/main/pipeline.py`
- 通用视频任务主路径不再依赖 `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` 作为主执行器
- 通用视频任务直接以 `VideoPipeline` 执行
- `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` 不再进入通用视频主链；是否仓库级彻底移除，作为单独清理决策执行

### 6.5 收敛结果协议

OpenClaw 只应该拿到稳定的结构化结果，而不是猜测内部文件名。

最终对外稳定协议建议至少包含：

- 主成片
- 字幕文件
- 封面图/封面视频相关产物
- `clip_text`
- `script`
- `render_manifest`
- 处理日志
- 失败信息与最后完成 stage

并且要补上正式契约：

- `schema_version`
- 必填字段清单
- artifacts 命名规则
- OpenClaw 读取结果的契约测试

### 7.6 建立平台无关入口

除了 worker 内主链切换，还需要把“外部怎么调用 CloneCut”做成稳定接口。

建议至少落两类入口：

- `HTTP API`：给 OpenClaw、MCP server、远程 agent 调用
- `CLI`：给 shell skill、本地 wrapper、调试与运维调用

这一步的目标不是替代 API，而是把“平台调用协议”从 OpenClaw 专属约定，提升为 CloneCut 通用能力。

### 7.7 生成 Skill 但不把 Skill 当内核

方案B允许并鼓励提供 skill，但 skill 的位置必须摆正：

- skill 是调用封装

 165:     def _build_openclaw_result(task: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
 166:         decorated = _decorate_task_for_api(task, include_openclaw_result=False)
 167:         task_id = str(decorated.get("task_id") or "").strip()
 168:         result = decorated.get("result") if isinstance(decorated.get("result"), dict) else {}
 169:         render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") if isinstance(result.get("render_manifest"), dict) else {}
 170:         artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
 171:         artifacts_by_id = {
 172:             str(item.get("artifact_id") or "").strip(): item
 173:             for item in artifacts
 174:             if isinstance(item, dict) and str(item.get("artifact_id") or "").strip()
 175:         }
 176:         videos = render_manifest.get("videos") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("videos"), dict) else {}
 177:         subtitles = render_manifest.get("subtitles") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("subtitles"), dict) else {}
 178:         texts = render_manifest.get("texts") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("texts"), dict) else {}
 179:         context = render_manifest.get("context") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("context"), dict) else {}
 180:         cover = render_manifest.get("cover") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("cover"), dict) else {}
 181:         logs = render_manifest.get("logs") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("logs"), dict) else {}
 182:         pipeline_state = (
 183:             render_manifest.get("pipeline_state") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("pipeline_state"), dict) else {}
 184:         )
 185: 
 186:         openclaw_result = {
 187:             "task_id": task_id,
 188:             "status": decorated.get("status"),
 189:             "is_ready": str(decorated.get("status") or "").strip().lower() == "completed",
 190:             "executed_mode": result.get("executed_mode"),
 191:             "status_url": decorated.get("status_url"),
 192:             "download_url": decorated.get("download_url"),
 193:             "artifacts_url": decorated.get("artifacts_url"),
 194:             "progress": {
 195:                 "current_stage": decorated.get("current_stage"),
 196:                 "stage_checkpoint": decorated.get("stage_checkpoint"),
 197:                 "last_completed_step": pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step"),
 198:                 "last_completed_step_name": pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step_name"),
 199:             },
 200:             "outputs": {
 201:                 "final_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("primary") or "")),
 202:                 "subtitled_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("subtitled") or "")),
 203:                 "no_subtitle_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("no_subtitle") or "")),
 204:                 "coverless_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("coverless") or "")),
 205:                 "alternate_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("alternate") or "")),
 206:                 "subtitle_srt": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(subtitles.get("srt") or "")),
 207:                 "subtitle_ass": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(subtitles.get("ass") or "")),
 208:                 "script_text": _artifact_ref_by_id(
 209:                     artifacts_by_id,
 210:                     str(texts.get("script") or subtitles.get("script") or ""),
 211:                 ),
 212:                 "clip_text": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(texts.get("clip_text") or "")),
 213:                 "cover_image": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(cover.get("image") or "")),
 214:                 "forum_post_info": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(context.get("forum_post_info") or "")),
 215:                 "processing_log": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(logs.get("processing") or "")),
 216:             },
 217:             "manifest": {
 218:                 "primary_artifact_id": render_manifest.get("primary_artifact_id"),
 219:                 "primary_download_url": render_manifest.get("primary_download_url"),
 220:                 "artifact_count": render_manifest.get("artifact_count"),
 221:             },
 222:         }
 223:         return _compact_json_like(openclaw_result)
 224: 
 225:     def _decorate_task_for_api(task: dict[str, Any], include_openclaw_result: bool = False) -> dict[str, Any]:
 226:         decorated = copy.deepcopy(task)
 227:         task_id = str(decorated.get("task_id") or "").strip()
 228:         if not task_id:
 229:             return decorated
 230: 
 231:         decorated["status_url"] = _build_status_url(task_id)

   9: from apps.api.openclaw_client import run_openclaw_video_task
  10: 
  11: 
  12: def _parse_args(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> argparse.Namespace:
  13:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Submit CloneCut video task and fetch OpenClaw-friendly result")
  14:     parser.add_argument("--api-base", default="http://127.0.0.1:18100", help="CloneCut API base URL")
  15:     parser.add_argument("--file", required=True, help="Local video path to upload")
  16:     parser.add_argument("--api-token", default="", help="CloneCut API token, optional")
  17:     parser.add_argument("--api-token-env", default="CLONECUT_API_TOKEN", help="fallback env name for api token")
  18:     parser.add_argument("--task-id", default="", help="optional explicit task id")
  19:     parser.add_argument("--source", default="openclaw_client", help="task source marker")
  20:     parser.add_argument("--stage5-model-name", default="", help="stage5 model name or backend model id")
  21:     parser.add_argument("--clip-text", default="", help="optional explicit clip text override")
  22:     parser.add_argument("--post-url", default="", help="optional forum post url")
  23:     parser.add_argument("--no-wait", action="store_true", help="only submit task without polling result")
  24:     parser.add_argument("--submit-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=30.0, help="submit request timeout")
  25:     parser.add_argument("--wait-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=1800.0, help="poll total timeout")
  26:     parser.add_argument("--poll-interval-seconds", type=float, default=5.0, help="poll interval")
  27:     parser.add_argument("--request-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=15.0, help="single polling request timeout")
  28:     parser.add_argument("--output-json", default="", help="optional path to persist final json result")
  29:     return parser.parse_args(list(argv) if argv is not None else None)
  30: 
  31: 
  32: def main(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> int:
  33:     args = _parse_args(argv)
  34:     api_token = str(args.api_token or "").strip() or str(os.getenv(args.api_token_env, "") or "").strip()
  35: 
  36:     extra_form: dict[str, str] = {}
  37:     if args.clip_text:
  38:         extra_form["clip_text"] = str(args.clip_text)
  39:     if args.post_url:
  40:         extra_form["post_url"] = str(args.post_url)
  41: 
  42:     payload = run_openclaw_video_task(
  43:         api_base=args.api_base,
  44:         video_path=args.file,
  45:         api_token=api_token,
  46:         task_id=args.task_id,
  47:         source=args.source,
  48:         stage5_model_name=args.stage5_model_name,
  49:         extra_form=extra_form,
  50:         wait=not bool(args.no_wait),
  51:         submit_timeout_seconds=float(args.submit_timeout_seconds),
  52:         wait_timeout_seconds=float(args.wait_timeout_seconds),
  53:         poll_interval_seconds=float(args.poll_interval_seconds),
  54:         request_timeout_seconds=float(args.request_timeout_seconds),
  55:     )
  56:     text = json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
  57:     print(text)
  58: 
  59:     output_json = str(args.output_json or "").strip()
  60:     if output_json:
  61:         output_path = Path(output_json).expanduser()
  62:         output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  63:         output_path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
  64:     return 0
  65: 
  66: 
  67: if __name__ == "__main__":
  68:     raise SystemExit(main())

  23:         self.get_responses = list(get_responses or [])

  25:         self.get_calls = []

  29:         if not self.post_responses:

  32: 
  33:     def get(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]

  35:         if not self.get_responses:

  37:         return self.get_responses.pop(0)

  40: def test_submit_openclaw_video_task_posts_expected_form(tmp_path) -> None:
  41:     video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
  42:     video.write_bytes(b"video")
  43:     session = _FakeSession(
  44:         post_responses=[
  45:             _FakeResponse(
  46:                 201,
  47:                 {
  48:                     "success": True,
  49:                     "task_id": "task-123",
  50:                     "openclaw_result_url": "/api/tasks/task-123/openclaw-result",
  51:                 },
  52:             )
  53:         ]
  54:     )
  55: 
  56:     payload = submit_openclaw_video_task(
  57:         api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
  58:         video_path=video,
  59:         api_token="token-1",
  60:         stage5_model_name="yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
  61:         extra_form={"metadata": {"source": "test"}},
  62:         session=session,
  63:     )
  64: 
  65:     assert payload.get("task_id") == "task-123"
  66:     call = session.post_calls[0]
  67:     assert call["url"] == "http://127.0.0.1:18100/api/tasks/upload-video"
  68:     assert call["headers"]["Authorization"] == "Bearer token-1"
  69:     assert call["data"]["stage5_model_name"] == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
  70:     assert call["data"]["metadata"] == '{"source": "test"}'
  71:     uploaded_name, _, uploaded_content_type = call["files"]["file"]
  72:     assert uploaded_name == "sample.mp4"
  73:     assert uploaded_content_type == "video/mp4"
  74: 
  75: 
  76: def test_wait_for_openclaw_result_polls_until_completed(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]

  78:         get_responses=[
  79:             _FakeResponse(
  80:                 200,
  81:                 {

  93:                 },
  94:             ),

  99:     payload = wait_for_openclaw_result(
 100:         api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
 101:         task_id="task-123",
 102:         poll_interval_seconds=0.2,
 103:         session=session,
 104:     )
 105: 
 106:     assert payload.get("openclaw_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"
 107:     assert len(session.get_calls) == 2
 108: 
 109: 
 110: def test_run_openclaw_video_task_returns_submit_and_result(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]

assistant #325 final_answer 04:11:14

**Findings** 1. 高: 你把当前阻塞点收敛成“`domain/video/stages/` 缺失”还不够完整。[方案B执行待办清单.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B执行待办清单.md:11) 和 [方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:95) 都这么写，但代码现实是 worke...

Expand full message

Findings
1. 高: 你把当前阻塞点收敛成“domain/video/stages/ 缺失”还不够完整。[方案B执行待办清单.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B执行待办清单.md:11) 和 [方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:95) 都这么写，但代码现实是 worker 现在仍直接跑旧脚本 [service.py](D:\clonecut\apps\worker\service.py:1356)，而且它自己的用例 [test_worker_service.py](D:\clonecut\tests\unit\test_worker_service.py:226) 已经会失败，原因是 state.json 只到 last_completed_step < 9 就被判定为 incomplete [service.py](D:\clonecut\apps\worker\service.py:1676)。这说明“过渡主链本身不稳”也应该被写成显式风险，不然排期会偏乐观。
2. 中: stage3_repair 的优先级在两份文档里互相打架。[方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:445) 说它应后置，只在骨架阶段给最小实现；但 [方案B执行待办清单.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B执行待办清单.md:75) 又把它放进 Phase 2.1 的首批迁移。这个会直接影响工期和执行顺序。
3. 中: Phase 5 的表述容易让人“再造一套 API/CLI”，但仓库里其实已经有入口雏形了。[方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:406) / [方案B执行待办清单.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B执行待办清单.md:181) 写成“建立平台无关通用入口”，可实际上已有结果聚合入口 [main.py](D:\clonecut\apps\api\main.py:165) 和 CLI 客户端 [openclaw_task_client.py](D:\clonecut\scripts\openclaw_task_client.py:12)。更准确的动作应是“抽象/收敛现有入口”，否则容易重复建设。
4. 中: schema_version 改造的测试清单不完整。[方案B执行待办清单.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B执行待办清单.md:171) 已要求给 openclaw_result / render_manifest 加 schema_version，但底部测试清单 [方案B执行待办清单.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B执行待办清单.md:258) 没把现有 OpenClaw 客户端契约测试显式列进去；而这些测试现在是存在且通过的 [test_openclaw_client.py](D:\clonecut\tests\unit\test_openclaw_client.py:40)。这类变更很容易把客户端悄悄打断。
5. 低: 章节编号有排版 bug。[方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:332) 开了“## 7”，下面却继续写“6.1~6.5”，后面又跳成“7.6/7.7” [方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md](D:\clonecut\docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:406)。不影响实现，但会影响讨论和引用。

结论
- 可行性: 可行，而且大方向是对的。
- 代码改动: 很大，属于“主链重建级”，不是补丁级。
- 文档问题数: 4 个实质问题 + 1 个轻微格式问题。
- 当前代码硬失败: 我实际验证到 3 个，分别是 domain.video.pipeline 导入失败、stage 测试收集失败、worker internal pipeline 用例失败。

为什么说改动大
- domain/video/stages/ 现在整目录缺失，而 [pipeline.py](D:\clonecut\domain\video\pipeline.py:9) 已经直接依赖它。
- [__init__.py](D:\clonecut\domain\video\__init__.py:3) 当前故意不导出 VideoPipeline，说明这条主链还没准备好对外使用。
- 旧 pre/stage/* 相关阶段源码我粗算大约 6663 行，相关新主链测试大约 1281 行。
- worker 主切换点集中在 [service.py](D:\clonecut\apps\worker\service.py:1307)，这个文件本身就很大，切换成本不会小。
- 结果协议也要同步改 [main.py](D:\clonecut\apps\api\main.py:165)，因为现在 openclaw_result 里还没有 schema_version。

我实际跑过的验证
- import domain.video.pipeline 失败，报 No module named 'domain.video.stages'。
- tests/unit/test_video_pipeline.py、test_stage4_stage5.py、test_stage6_clip.py 都在收集阶段失败。
- tests/unit/test_worker_service.py -k internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8 失败，任务卡在 processing。
- tests/unit/test_openclaw_client.py 通过，render_manifest 相关 worker 用例也通过。
- 这说明“入口层已有基础”，“主链本体缺失”这两个判断同时成立。

总体建议
- 先修文档，再开工。
- 文档里先补一条显式风险: “当前 internal pipeline 基线不稳定，需决定是先修、还是直接放弃并以新 VideoPipeline 替代”。
- 把 stage3_repair 的优先级统一。
- 把 Phase 5 改成“收敛现有 API/CLI”，不要写成从零新建。

本次没有改你的文件。

1. 如果你要，我可以直接把这两份文档按上面的审计结果改成“可执行版”。
2. 如果你要，我也可以继续往下做第二步，给你拆一版更现实的开发工期和代码改动清单。

Output:
---
name: systematic-debugging
description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes
---

# Systematic Debugging

## Overview

Random fixes waste time and create new bugs. Quick patches mask underlying issues.

**Core principle:** ALWAYS find root cause before attempting fixes. Symptom fixes are failure.

**Violating the letter of this process is violating the spirit of debugging.**

## The Iron Law

```
NO FIXES WITHOUT ROOT CAUSE INVESTIGATION FIRST
```

If you haven't completed Phase 1, you cannot propose fixes.

## When to Use

Use for ANY technical issue:
- Test failures
- Bugs in production
- Unexpected behavior
- Performance problems
- Build failures
- Integration issues

**Use this ESPECIALLY when:**
- Under time pressure (emergencies make guessing tempting)
- "Just one quick fix" seems obvious
- You've already tried multiple fixes
- Previous fix didn't work
- You don't fully understand the issue

**Don't skip when:**
- Issue seems simple (simple bugs have root causes too)
- You're in a hurry (rushing guarantees rework)
- Manager wants it fixed NOW (systematic is faster than thrashing)

## The Four Phases

You MUST complete each phase before proceeding to the next.

### Phase 1: Root Cause Investigation

**BEFORE attempting ANY fix:**

1. **Read Error Messages Carefully**
   - Don't skip past errors or warnings
   - They often contain the exact solution
   - Read stack traces completely
   - Note line numbers, file paths, error codes

2. **Reproduce Consistently**
   - Can you trigger it reliably?
   - What are the exact steps?
   - Does it happen every time?
   - If not reproducible 鈫?gather more data, don't guess

3. **Check Recent Changes**
   - What changed that could cause this?
   - Git diff, recent commits
   - New dependencies, config changes
   - Environmental differences

4. **Gather Evidence in Multi-Component Systems**

   **WHEN system has multiple components (CI 鈫?build 鈫?signing, API 鈫?service 鈫?database):**

   **BEFORE proposing fixes, add diagnostic instrumentation:**
   ```
   For EACH component boundary:
     - Log what data enters component
     - Log what data exits component
     - Verify environment/config propagation
     - Check state at each layer

   Run once to gather evidence showing WHERE it breaks
   THEN analyze evidence to identify failing component
   THEN investigate that specific component
   ```

   **Example (multi-layer system):**
   ```bash
   # Layer 1: Workflow
   echo "=== Secrets available in workflow: ==="
   echo "IDENTITY: ${IDENTITY:+SET}${IDENTITY:-UNSET}"

   # Layer 2: Build script
   echo "=== Env vars in build script: ==="
   env | grep IDENTITY || echo "IDENTITY not in environment"

   # Layer 3: Signing script
   echo "=== Keychain state: ==="
   security list-keychains
   security find-identity -v

   # Layer 4: Actual signing
   codesign --sign "$IDENTITY" --verbose=4 "$APP"
   ```

   **This reveals:** Which layer fails (secrets 鈫?workflow 鉁? workflow 鈫?build 鉁?

5. **Trace Data Flow**

   **WHEN error is deep in call stack:**

   See `root-cause-tracing.md` in this directory for the complete backward tracing technique.

   **Quick version:**
   - Where does bad value originate?
   - What called this with bad value?
   - Keep tracing up until you find the source
   - Fix at source, not at symptom

### Phase 2: Pattern Analysis

**Find the pattern before fixing:**

1. **Find Working Examples**
   - Locate similar working code in same codebase
   - What works that's similar to what's broken?

2. **Compare Against References**
   - If implementing pattern, read reference implementation COMPLETELY
   - Don't skim - read every line
   - Understand the pattern fully before applying

3. **Identify Differences**
   - What's different between working and broken?
   - List every difference, however small
   - Don't assume "that can't matter"

4. **Understand Dependencies**
   - What other components does this need?
   - What settings, config, environment?
   - What assumptions does it make?

### Phase 3: Hypothesis and Testing

**Scientific method:**

1. **Form Single Hypothesis**
   - State clearly: "I think X is the root cause because Y"
   - Write it down
   - Be specific, not vague

2. **Test Minimally**
   - Make the SMALLEST possible change to test hypothesis
   - One variable at a time
   - Don't fix multiple things at once

3. **Verify Before Continuing**
   - Did it work? Yes 鈫?Phase 4
   - Didn't work? Form NEW hypothesis
   - DON'T add more fixes on top

4. **When You Don't Know**
   - Say "I don't understand X"
   - Don't pretend to know
   - Ask for help
   - Research more

### Phase 4: Implementation

**Fix the root cause, not the symptom:**

1. **Create Failing Test Case**
   - Simplest possible reproduction
   - Automated test if possible
   - One-off test script if no framework
   - MUST have before fixing
   - Use the `superpowers:test-driven-development` skill for writing proper failing tests

2. **Implement Single Fix**
   - Address the root cause identified
   - ONE change at a time
   - No "while I'm here" improvements
   - No bundled refactoring

3. **Verify Fix**
   - Test passes now?
   - No other tests broken?
   - Issue actually resolved?

4. **If Fix Doesn't Work**
   - STOP
   - Count: How many fixes have you tried?
   - If < 3: Return to Phase 1, re-analyze with new information
   - **If 鈮?3: STOP and question the architecture (step 5 below)**
   - DON'T attempt Fix #4 without architectural discussion

5. **If 3+ Fixes Failed: Question Architecture**

   **Pattern indicating architectural problem:**
   - Each fix reveals new shared state/coupling/problem in different place
   - Fixes require "massive refactoring" to implement
   - Each fix creates new symptoms elsewhere

   **STOP and question fundamentals:**
   - Is this pattern fundamentally sound?
   - Are we "sticking with it through sheer inertia"?
   - Should we refactor architecture vs. continue fixing symptoms?

   **Discuss with your human partner before attempting more fixes**

   This is NOT a failed hypothesis - this is a wrong architecture.

## Red Flags - STOP and Follow Process

If you catch yourself thinking:
- "Quick fix for now, investigate later"
- "Just try changing X and see if it works"
- "Add multiple changes, run tests"
- "Skip the test, I'll manually verify"
- "It's probably X, let me fix that"
- "I don't fully understand but this might work"
- "Pattern says X but I'll adapt it differently"
- "Here are the main problems: [lists fixes without investigation]"
- Proposing solutions before tracing data flow
- **"One more fix attempt" (when already tried 2+)**
- **Each fix reveals new problem in different place**

**ALL of these mean: STOP. Return to Phase 1.**

**If 3+ fixes failed:** Question the architecture (see Phase 4.5)

## your human partner's Signals You're Doing It Wrong

**Watch for these redirections:**
- "Is that not happening?" - You assumed without verifying
- "Will it show us...?" - You should have added evidence gathering
- "Stop guessing" - You're proposing fixes without understanding
- "Ultrathink this" - Question fundamentals, not just symptoms
- "We're stuck?" (frustrated) - Your approach isn't working

**When you see these:** STOP. Return to Phase 1.

## Common Rationalizations

| Excuse | Reality |
|--------|---------|
| "Issue is simple, don't need process" | Simple issues have root causes too. Process is fast for simple bugs. |
| "Emergency, no time for process" | Systematic debugging is FASTER than guess-and-check thrashing. |
| "Just try this first, then investigate" | First fix sets the pattern. Do it right from the start. |
| "I'll write test after confirming fix works" | Untested fixes don't stick. Test first proves it. |
| "Multiple fixes at once saves time" | Can't isolate what worked. Causes new bugs. |
| "Reference too long, I'll adapt the pattern" | Partial understanding guarantees bugs. Read it completely. |
| "I see the problem, let me fix it" | Seeing symptoms 鈮?understanding root cause. |
| "One more fix attempt" (after 2+ failures) | 3+ failures = architectural problem. Question pattern, don't fix again. |

## Quick Reference

| Phase | Key Activities | Success Criteria |
|-------|---------------|------------------|
| **1. Root Cause** | Read errors, reproduce, check changes, gather evidence | Understand WHAT and WHY |
| **2. Pattern** | Find working examples, compare | Identify differences |
| **3. Hypothesis** | Form theory, test minimally | Confirmed or new hypothesis |
| **4. Implementation** | Create test, fix, verify | Bug resolved, tests pass |

## When Process Reveals "No Root Cause"

If systematic investigation reveals issue is truly environmental, timing-dependent, or external:

1. You've completed the process
2. Document what you investigated
3. Implement appropriate handling (retry, timeout, error message)
4. Add monitoring/logging for future investigation

**But:** 95% of "no root cause" cases are incomplete investigation.

## Supporting Techniques

These techniques are part of systematic debugging and available in this directory:

- **`root-cause-tracing.md`** - Trace bugs backward through call stack to find original trigger
- **`defense-in-depth.md`** - Add validation at multiple layers after finding root cause
- **`condition-based-waiting.md`** - Replace arbitrary timeouts with condition polling

**Related skills:**
- **superpowers:test-driven-development** - For creating failing test case (Phase 4, Step 1)
- **superpowers:verification-before-completion** - Verify fix worked before claiming success

## Real-World Impact

From debugging sessions:
- Systematic approach: 15-30 minutes to fix
- Random fixes approach: 2-3 hours of thrashing
- First-time fix rate: 95% vs 40%
- New bugs introduced: Near zero vs common

Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
---
name: verification-before-completion
description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
---

# Verification Before Completion

## Overview

Claiming work is complete without verification is dishonesty, not efficiency.

**Core principle:** Evidence before claims, always.

**Violating the letter of this rule is violating the spirit of this rule.**

## The Iron Law

```
NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE
```

If you haven't run the verification command in this message, you cannot claim it passes.

## The Gate Function

```
BEFORE claiming any status or expressing satisfaction:

1. IDENTIFY: What command proves this claim?
2. RUN: Execute the FULL command (fresh, complete)
3. READ: Full output, check exit code, count failures
4. VERIFY: Does output confirm the claim?
   - If NO: State actual status with evidence
   - If YES: State claim WITH evidence
5. ONLY THEN: Make the claim

Skip any step = lying, not verifying
```

## Common Failures

| Claim | Requires | Not Sufficient |
|-------|----------|----------------|
| Tests pass | Test command output: 0 failures | Previous run, "should pass" |
| Linter clean | Linter output: 0 errors | Partial check, extrapolation |
| Build succeeds | Build command: exit 0 | Linter passing, logs look good |
| Bug fixed | Test original symptom: passes | Code changed, assumed fixed |
| Regression test works | Red-green cycle verified | Test passes once |
| Agent completed | VCS diff shows changes | Agent reports "success" |
| Requirements met | Line-by-line checklist | Tests passing |

## Red Flags - STOP

- Using "should", "probably", "seems to"
- Expressing satisfaction before verification ("Great!", "Perfect!", "Done!", etc.)
- About to commit/push/PR without verification
- Trusting agent success reports
- Relying on partial verification
- Thinking "just this once"
- Tired and wanting work over
- **ANY wording implying success without having run verification**

## Rationalization Prevention

| Excuse | Reality |
|--------|---------|
| "Should work now" | RUN the verification |
| "I'm confident" | Confidence 鈮?evidence |
| "Just this once" | No exceptions |
| "Linter passed" | Linter 鈮?compiler |
| "Agent said success" | Verify independently |
| "I'm tired" | Exhaustion 鈮?excuse |
| "Partial check is enough" | Partial proves nothing |
| "Different words so rule doesn't apply" | Spirit over letter |

## Key Patterns

**Tests:**
```
鉁?[Run test command] [See: 34/34 pass] "All tests pass"
鉂?"Should pass now" / "Looks correct"
```

**Regression tests (TDD Red-Green):**
```
鉁?Write 鈫?Run (pass) 鈫?Revert fix 鈫?Run (MUST FAIL) 鈫?Restore 鈫?Run (pass)
鉂?"I've written a regression test" (without red-green verification)
```

**Build:**
```
鉁?[Run build] [See: exit 0] "Build passes"
鉂?"Linter passed" (linter doesn't check compilation)
```

**Requirements:**
```
鉁?Re-read plan 鈫?Create checklist 鈫?Verify each 鈫?Report gaps or completion
鉂?"Tests pass, phase complete"
```

**Agent delegation:**
```
鉁?Agent reports success 鈫?Check VCS diff 鈫?Verify changes 鈫?Report actual state
鉂?Trust agent report
```

## Why This Matters

From 24 failure memories:
- your human partner said "I don't believe you" - trust broken
- Undefined functions shipped - would crash
- Missing requirements shipped - incomplete features
- Time wasted on false completion 鈫?redirect 鈫?rework
- Violates: "Honesty is a core value. If you lie, you'll be replaced."

## When To Apply

**ALWAYS before:**
- ANY variation of success/completion claims
- ANY expression of satisfaction
- ANY positive statement about work state
- Committing, PR creation, task completion
- Moving to next task
- Delegating to agents

**Rule applies to:**
- Exact phrases
- Paraphrases and synonyms
- Implications of success
- ANY communication suggesting completion/correctness

## The Bottom Line

**No shortcuts for verification.**

Run the command. Read the output. THEN claim the result.

This is non-negotiable.

# 项目目标 v2

## 元信息
- 版本: v2
- 创建日期: 2026-03-25
- 上一版本: v1

## 北极星目标
基于现有视频域文档与实际代码，明确 `clonecut` 演进到“通过 OpenClaw 上传视频，并通过自然语言完成剪辑、封面、字幕生成与多轮调整”的可执行路线；优先补齐可供 skill 调用的工程底座，而不是直接把旧交互式流水线包装成 skill。

## 范围
- 阅读并对齐视频域架构、FunClip 升级、预处理阶段审计与整体优化方案文档。
- 复核 `apps/api`、`apps/worker`、`domain/video/funclip`、`domain/video/pre`、`domain/video/pipeline`、`apps/gradio_ui` 等关键代码入口。
- 判断实现自然语言多轮编辑所需的前置能力、结构化中间产物与服务接口。
- 给出分阶段实施顺序与第一批开发任务。

## 验收信号
- 明确回答是否应“先优化项目，再做 skill”。
- 形成与代码现实一致的分阶段路线图。
- 输出可直接进入开发排期的第一步任务清单。

## 变更记录
- 2026-03-25: 用户将目标切换为视频域架构梳理与 OpenClaw 剪辑 skill 落地路线，创建 v2。

# 项目待办

## 绑定信息
- 目标版本: goal_v2
- 待办版本: v2_3
- 创建日期: 2026-03-27
- 状态: 当前生效

## 当前阶段结论
- 方案B已确定为当前执行路线：以 `domain/video/pipeline.py` + `domain/video/stages/` 作为唯一生产主链，禁止旧架构级兜底，禁止长期双轨运行。
- 当前阻塞点不是 OpenClaw 接口层，而是内置视频流水线本体未完成：`domain/video/pipeline.py` 依赖的 `domain/video/stages/` 缺失。
- 上一阶段成果已独立提交并推送：`9a0d91a feat: add warm internal pipeline runner`。
- Redis 继续采用宿主机服务化方式，不以 Docker 部署为未来前提。
- 当前测试已锁定的 `strict_rejected`、`timeline_fallback`、`copy_fallback`、`rule_based` 等行为，在等价替代契约落地前继续按正式运行时保护处理，不视为旧架构兜底。
- OpenClaw 只是第一层 skill 适配平台，不是系统唯一宿主；方案B新增明确三层结构：平台无关核心能力层、API/CLI 通用入口层、Skill/Wrapper 适配层。

## 里程碑
- [x] 完成 OpenClaw 第一版与现有 `pre` 生产链的端到端打通
- [x] 完成 warm runner 试验并独立提交归档
- [x] 明确当前核心目的：用户经 OpenClaw 提交视频，CloneCut 完成“去气口/重复内容 -> 剪辑 -> 字幕 -> 封面 -> 回传产物”
- [x] 输出方案B实施方案文档与执行待办清单
- [ ] 重建 `domain/video/stages/` 并恢复 `VideoPipeline` 可运行骨架
- [ ] 将 worker 真实执行路径切换到 `VideoPipeline`
- [ ] 用 `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` 完成 OpenClaw 新主链 smoke test
- [ ] 下线旧 `pre` 主链的运行时依赖

## 当前进行中
- 方案B Phase 0：冻结边界与执行口径，文档化“单一路径、禁止旧架构级兜底、保留明确报错保护、worker 内常驻预热”的新设计。
- 方案B Phase 1 准备启动：按测试和 `domain/video/pipeline.py` 的目标接口重建 `domain/video/stages/`，并先补最小可运行骨架；后续在主链收敛后建立平台无关 API/CLI 和多平台 skill 适配层。

## 已完成
- 已确认当前真实运行链仍由 `domain/video/pre/main/pipeline.py` 驱动，OpenClaw 已可通过现有 API/worker 跑通真实 `test.mp4`。
- 已在 Windows 宿主机安装并跑通本地 Redis，当前 API 已运行在 Redis 队列/注册模式。
- 已完成结果协议首轮收敛，OpenClaw 可获取 `openclaw_result` 与关键 artifacts。
- 已验证 warm runner 能显著减少“每任务重新起解释器”的额外开销，但该方案仅作为上一阶段试验结果保留，不进入方案B主设计。

## 待完成
- 重建 `domain/video/stages/base.py`、`utils.py` 与各 stage 模块，恢复 `domain.video.pipeline` 的可导入与可测试状态。
- 对照 `domain/video/pre/stage/*` 迁移主链算法，去除交互式输入和脚本式副作用。
- 将 ASR、VideoClipper、字幕处理、封面渲染等重资源收敛为 worker 进程内常驻资源，并补齐并发治理与 ready 信号。
- 修改 `apps/worker/service.py`，让通用视频任务主路径直接调用 `VideoPipeline`。
- 建立平台无关 API/CLI 通用入口，让任何支持 skill/tool/shell/MCP 的平台都可以复用 CloneCut 能力。
- 让 OpenClaw skill 改为调用通用入口，而不是直接绑定内部实现；并预留其他平台 skill/wrapper 的接入方式。
- 用 OpenClaw 重新完成 `test.mp4` 端到端验证，并确认主成片、字幕、封面、脚本、日志回传稳定。
- 清理旧 `pre/main/pipeline.py` 在 worker 主路径上的运行时依赖，并单独决策 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` 是迁移期兼容还是正式废弃。

## 后置优化待办
- `fast` / `standard` / `full` 执行档位
- 自然语言到结构化执行选项映射
- “只剪辑、不加字幕、不加封面”等用户控制能力
- 封面标题生成策略细化
- 更细粒度的性能指标与批处理优化

docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:1:# 方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案
docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:12:- 让 OpenClaw 只面对稳定的任务协议和产物协议
docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:21:> 用户通过 OpenClaw 提交视频后，CloneCut 按现有业务规则完成“去气口/停顿、删除重复内容、重剪、重新生成字幕、烧录字幕、添加封面、整理产物”，然后把成片和关键中间产物稳定返回给 OpenClaw。
docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:40:方案B的目标不是“让 CloneCut 依赖 OpenClaw 才能工作”，而是：

docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:88:- OpenClaw skill 可以存在，而且应该存在
docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:95:当前分支虽然已经把 OpenClaw 与现有 `pre` 流水线打通，也做了 warm runner 降低固定冷启动，但这条路仍有三个根本问题：

docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:208:- OpenClaw 只依赖任务接口与结果接口，不依赖内部脚本文件名
docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:214:- OpenClaw 不直接依赖 `domain/video/*` 内部细节

docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:482:目标：让 CloneCut 可以被任何外部平台通过统一入口调用，而不是只为 OpenClaw 服务。
docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:493:目标：先提供 OpenClaw skill，再为其他平台预留复用方式。

docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:501:### 阶段7：OpenClaw 端到端复测
docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:532:7. OpenClaw skill 通过通用入口调用 CloneCut，而不是直接依赖内部实现

docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:546:- 不把 OpenClaw skill 直接做成唯一入口
docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md:570:> 不是继续包旧链路，也不是把 OpenClaw 当成唯一宿主，而是把 `domain/video/pipeline.py + domain/video/stages/` 真正做成平台无关的唯一主链，并把常驻内存预热能力收敛到 worker 进程内部。

docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:1:# OpenClaw 接入现有视频生产链实施计划
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:5:本文档是对 `docs/视频域重构与OpenClaw剪辑Skill实施计划.md` 的进一步收束。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:9:- 先把现有专用视频生产链接入 OpenClaw
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:48:因此，OpenClaw 第一版接入时，不能把这一步理解成自由创作型 LLM 编辑器，而应视为一条受强规则约束的专用文本处理步骤。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:54:> 让 OpenClaw 能调用现有 `clonecut` 专用视频生产链，稳定完成一条视频从“去气口 -> 文本裁剪 -> 剪辑 -> 字幕 -> 封面”的自动处理。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:69:短期内继续使用当前仓库中的 `domain/video/funclip` 作为可运行引擎，优先保证 OpenClaw 第一版尽快打通现有生产链。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:92:不是因为这件事不重要，而是因为它会拖慢 OpenClaw 第一版落地。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:108:这会显著拉长 OpenClaw 第一版上线时间。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:112:1. 先用现有 fork 跑通 OpenClaw 第一版
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:117:## 7. OpenClaw V1 的最小目标
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:119:OpenClaw 第一版不做“通用视频编辑 skill”，只做“现有专用流水线的任务入口和结果回读”。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:143:### 7.3 OpenClaw 第一版能力
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:166:当前兼容链路仍以 `stage1 -> stage8` 为准，只是优先改造最阻塞 OpenClaw 接入的 `stage5/stage6`。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:188:不要让 OpenClaw 自己理解和拼装当前兼容流水线细节，而是由仓库内部提供一个统一入口。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:207:### Phase C：接入 worker / API / OpenClaw
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:211:让 OpenClaw 不直接操作脚本文件，而是调用统一服务入口。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:215:1. OpenClaw 提交视频任务
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:224:为后续回归官方 FunClip 或替换同类引擎做准备，但不阻塞 OpenClaw 第一版。
docs\OpenClaw接入现有视频生产链实施计划.md:238:让“删除停顿词和重复内容”这一步可以被 API / worker / OpenClaw 调用。

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: param( [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)] [string]$File, [string]$ApiBase = "http://127.0.0.1:18100", [string]$ApiToken = "", [string]$Ta...

Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]
    [string]$File,

    [string]$ApiBase = "http://127.0.0.1:18100",
    [string]$ApiToken = "",
    [string]$TaskId = "",
    [string]$Source = "openclaw_skill",
    [string]$Stage5ModelName = "",
    [string]$ClipText = "",
    [string]$PostUrl = "",
    [switch]$NoWait,
    [double]$SubmitTimeoutSeconds = 30,
    [double]$WaitTimeoutSeconds = 1800,
    [double]$PollIntervalSeconds = 5,
    [double]$RequestTimeoutSeconds = 15,
    [string]$OutputJson = ""
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "..")).Path
$pythonExe = Join-Path $repoRoot ".venv-t13\\Scripts\\python.exe"
$clientScript = Join-Path $repoRoot "scripts\\openclaw_task_client.py"

if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $pythonExe)) {
    throw "missing python runtime: $pythonExe"
}
if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $clientScript)) {
    throw "missing client script: $clientScript"
}

$resolvedFile = (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $File).Path
$args = @(
    $clientScript,
    "--api-base", $ApiBase,
    "--file", $resolvedFile,
    "--source", $Source,
    "--submit-timeout-seconds", [string]$SubmitTimeoutSeconds,
    "--wait-timeout-seconds", [string]$WaitTimeoutSeconds,
    "--poll-interval-seconds", [string]$PollIntervalSeconds,
    "--request-timeout-seconds", [string]$RequestTimeoutSeconds
)

if ($ApiToken) {
    $args += @("--api-token", $ApiToken)
}
if ($TaskId) {
    $args += @("--task-id", $TaskId)
}
if ($Stage5ModelName) {
    $args += @("--stage5-model-name", $Stage5ModelName)
}
if ($ClipText) {
    $args += @("--clip-text", $ClipText)
}
if ($PostUrl) {
    $args += @("--post-url", $PostUrl)
}
if ($NoWait) {
    $args += "--no-wait"
}
if ($OutputJson) {
    $args += @("--output-json", $OutputJson)
}

& $pythonExe @args
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
    exit $LASTEXITCODE
}
Tool Result #367 shell_command call_GmKuVfAeW0fZ2GrWHeHBuWOH exit 0 04:17:58
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: param( [string]$WorkspaceRoot = "D:\openclaw_docker_state\workspace", [string]$SkillDirName = "clonecut-video-pipeline" ) Set-StrictM...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
param(
    [string]$WorkspaceRoot = "D:\openclaw_docker_state\workspace",
    [string]$SkillDirName = "clonecut-video-pipeline"
)

Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$repoRoot = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
$sourceDir = Join-Path $repoRoot ("skills\" + $SkillDirName)
$skillsRoot = Join-Path $WorkspaceRoot "skills"
$destDir = Join-Path $skillsRoot $SkillDirName

if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $sourceDir -PathType Container)) {
    throw "skill source directory not found: $sourceDir"
}

$workspaceRootFull = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($WorkspaceRoot)
$skillsRootFull = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($skillsRoot)
$destDirFull = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($destDir)

if (-not $destDirFull.StartsWith($skillsRootFull, [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
    throw "resolved destination escapes workspace skills root: $destDirFull"
}

New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $skillsRootFull | Out-Null

if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $destDirFull) {
    Remove-Item -LiteralPath $destDirFull -Recurse -Force
}

Copy-Item -LiteralPath $sourceDir -Destination $destDirFull -Recurse -Force

Write-Output "Synced OpenClaw skill to $destDirFull"
